text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A woman in a suit calls out to us as Curren Chan
and I are out walking by the station.

text_block_list.name: Woman in Suit
text_block_list.text:
It's you! You're Curren—that Umastagrammer
everyone is talking about, right?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow! ♪ You've heard of lil' ol' me?

text_block_list.name: Woman in Suit
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Allow me to get straight to the point! I
work for an entertainment agency, and we're
interested in recruiting you!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow. Thank you for the offer. But... I'm afraid I
have to refuse.

text_block_list.name: Woman in Suit
text_block_list.text:
Wh-why?! Someone as cute as you should be
shining in the entertainment industry!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Have you ever seen me run?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm actually getting more and more fans by the
day. ♪ Everyone's asking, "Who's that cute and
speedy Umamusume?"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It's funny to hear "cute" and "speedy" in the
same sentence.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But I'm confident I can be cuter than anyone. And
that's because of...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
All the physical and mental training I do with my
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
All the physical and mental training I do with my
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm not just the cutest girl in the world—I'm the
cutest runner in the world too. ♪

text_block_list.name: Woman in Suit
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I-I see what you mean. Please excuse what I
said earlier. I think I understand now why you're
so cute and radiant.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I'm so happy you get it! Thank you for
understanding. You're a really nice lady. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Ehe. I wanna be even cuter, Big Bro!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Ehe. I wanna be even cuter, Big Sis!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears that Curren Chan also feels herself
getting stronger from our daily training sessions!
